user.title: Bosch eBike Flow Login
user.description:
**Before you begin:** open Developer Tools (F12), go to the **Network** tab, and enable **Preserve log**.

Then open the link below to log in:

**[Log in to Bosch eBike Flow]({auth_url})**

After logging in, the browser will fail to open the redirect URL. This is expected.

Click **Submit** below once you have logged in.

code.title: Enter Authorization Code
code.description:
In the Network tab (F12), find the redirect request (status **302**, to a URL containing `login-actions`). Click it, then in the **Response Headers** find the `Location` value — it starts with `onebikeapp-android://` and contains `code=`.

Copy the full `Location` URL and paste it below, or just the `code=` value.

data_description.code: The full redirect URL from the Location header, or just the code value

error.invalid_code: Could not find an authorization code in the input.
error.token_exchange_failed: Failed to exchange the code for a token. The code may have expired — please try again.
error.api_error: Authenticated successfully but could not connect to the Bosch eBike API.
